files.name: welcome.txt
files.content:
Welcome to SECSIM.

This workspace contains simulated corporate data used to
practice access control, threat recognition, and incident
response. Nothing here is real. Switch roles and modes above
to see how visibility and enforcement change.

files.name: network_diagram.txt
files.content:
[SIMULATED TOPOLOGY]
Edge FW -> Core Switch -> {Corp VLAN, Guest VLAN, OT VLAN}
Corp VLAN -> App Servers -> DB (10.20.4.0/24)
Note: OT VLAN has flat routing to Corp VLAN — no segmentation.

files.name: firewall_rules.conf
files.content:
# SIMULATED RULESET
allow tcp any -> 10.20.4.0/24:443
allow tcp any -> 10.20.4.0/24:22   # <-- overly broad, flagged
deny  all -> OT_VLAN from CORP_VLAN  # currently disabled

files.name: phishing_response.md
files.content:
# Phishing Response (Simulated Playbook)
1. Detect via mail gateway / user report
2. Triage: sandbox the link/attachment
3. Contain: revoke tokens, purge message org-wide
4. Eradicate: block sender domain at gateway + FW
5. Recover: force password reset, re-verify MFA
6. Lessons learned: targeted awareness training

files.name: ransomware_response.md
files.content:
# Ransomware Response (Simulated Playbook)
1. Detect: EDR flags mass file encryption
2. Isolate affected hosts from the network immediately
3. Preserve volatile evidence before shutdown
4. Identify variant + initial access vector
5. Restore from offline/immutable backups
6. Post-incident: patch entry point, rotate creds
